mainEntity.name: Timeline for workers' comp hearing after denied forklift claim in Holladay UT?
mainEntity.text: Timeline for workers' comp hearing after denied forklift claim in Holladay UT?

acceptedAnswer.text: Request hearing within 1 year denial; scheduled 60-90 days later. Decision 30 days post-hearing; appeals to district court 30 days.

suggestedAnswer.text: Holladay delays common in peak seasons; prepare OSHA logs, expert mechanics report. 70% denials overturned with counsel per Labor data.
